New Malicious npm Package Discovered

Socket researchers have identified a supply chain attack targeting developers.

Indicators of Compromise (IOCs)

Files

router_init.js - SHA256 ab4fcadaec1d282b900de5abb5b1d55dbd0e7af9628f6e7a5e2cb0e68b3b56aa - SHA1 12ed9a3cab1b2e3d4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a2b3c4d5e - MD5 833fd59e4b3c2a1d5e6f7a8b9c0d1234

Network

Conclusion

Remove these packages immediately.
